description: Async Python framework for Max Bot API, inspired by aiogram. Typed, extensible interface for building bots in Max messenger.
rules: maxogram is for Max Bot API (dev.max.ru), NOT Telegram Bot API
Max messenger is a Russian messenger by VK (rebranded from TamTam in 2025)
Do not confuse with VK Teams / myteam - these are different platforms
Use aiohttp for HTTP sessions, Pydantic v2 for models
Import key classes: from maxogram import Bot, Dispatcher, Router, F
FSM storage options: MemoryStorage (default), RedisStorage, MongoStorage
